HGSS.672.0002: Call me anytime if you want to battle!
HGSS.672.0003:
I figured that if I found anything in the
area, I’d give it to you...
HGSS.672.0004:
You wanna trade phone numbers
after all? [0200,0000]
HGSS.672.0005:
Oh, here you are!\f
I’ll give you this Berry that my Pokémon
found. Here you go!\f
HGSS.672.0006:
I have to say it’s kind of strange to be
talking on the phone when you’re\r
standing nearby.
HGSS.672.0007:
My [0100,000A,0000] is always training!\f
It won’t lose to any [0100,000B,0000]!
HGSS.672.0008:
Hey! Psst! Listen!
This [0100,000B,0000] I ran into earlier\r
just up and ran away!\f
I was so disappointed!
I really wanted to catch it, too!
HGSS.672.0009:
Did you catch any [0100,000B,0000] yet?
You can always find them around here.
HGSS.672.0010:
Will you battle my trained Pokémon?\f
We’re on [0104,0003,0000], so give me
a shout when you’re in the area!
HGSS.672.0011:
Where are you now?
Close to [0104,0003,0000]?\r
Don’t tell me you forgot we were going\r
to have a battle?
HGSS.672.0012:
While I was walking around the forest
trying to find Pokémon, I cut my finger\r
on a leaf!\f
It bled a little, but I’m fine.
HGSS.672.0013:
My Pokémon found its
most cherished Berry!\f
We’re on [0104,0003,0000] if you
want it!
HGSS.672.0014:
Yeah... We’d really like to give you this
Berry... We’re on [0104,0003,0000], so\r
come get it please!
